title: Abu: The Giant Monster
overview: Sofian, who is investigating mysterious disappearances of anglers at a lake in KL, accidentally recorded a gigantic lizard-like monster surfacing briefly. The video was uploaded to YouTube and it caught the attention of Zaara, who believes the monster is her escaped pet gecko named Abu, but she has no idea how it has grown so big. Sofian & Zaara started to investigate, but when the sightings became frequent, they started to cause public commotion and it became a national security issue.
